image.title: NAK Hong, W Cao, Z Liu, L Lin, X Zhou, Y Zeng, Y Wei, L Chen, X Liu, Y Han, L Ruan, T Li

item.title: Prolonged presence of viral nucleic acid in clinically recovered COVID-19 patients was not associated with effective infectiousness.
